title: Grilled Smoked Salmon with Grassy Notes
description: A refreshing summer dish featuring smoky Norwegian salmon, paired with grassy notes from a fragrant herb. Perfect for a light dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: Fresh Parsley
ingredients.notes: Add grassy notes to the dish

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (400°F).
Rinse the salmon fillets under cold water and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Season the salmon with salt and pepper.
Drizzle a tablespoon of olive oil on each fillet.
Place the salmon on the grill and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
While the salmon is cooking, mix the lemon juice and parsley together in a small bowl.
Once the salmon is done, remove it from the grill and place it on a plate.
Drizzle the lemon-parsley mixture over the top of the salmon.
